summary: Selection/settings UI: options menu (10 settings), character select grid with button remapping, stage select, high score display with sorted character scores.

functions.name: options_input_handler
functions.summary: Generic input handler for 10-option grid. D-pad up/down cycles selection (slot), left/right adjusts value. 15-frame debounce.

functions.name: options_menu_task
functions.summary: Main options menu task: polls both controllers, routes to options_input_handler.

functions.name: option_game_mode
functions.summary: Option slot 0: game mode selection. 3 frames (0-2) → sets x_028e5846.

functions.name: option_round_count
functions.summary: Option slot 1: number of rounds. 3 frames (0-2) → sets x_c8356c60.

functions.name: option_rounds_win
functions.summary: Option slot 2: rounds needed to win. 5 frames (0-4) → sets x_adcfd05c.

functions.name: option_sound_mute
functions.summary: Option slot 3: sound mute toggle. 2 frames (0-1) → sets sAudioMuted.

functions.name: option_bgm_volume
functions.summary: Option slot 4: BGM volume. 10 values (0-9) → sets sMusicVolumeSetting, calls audio_bgm_set_vol.

functions.name: option_sfx_volume
functions.summary: Option slot 5: SFX volume. 10 values (0-9) → sets gSfxVolumeSetting, calls audio_sfx_set_vol.

functions.name: option_controller_setup
functions.summary: Option slot 6: controller config → transition to SCREEN x_b84bd571.

functions.name: option_char_config
functions.summary: Option slot 7: character config → transition to SCREEN x_2e33c051.

functions.name: option_stage_select
functions.summary: Option slot 8: stage select → transition to SCREEN x_c63c063f.

functions.name: option_back_attract
functions.summary: Option slot 9: back to attract mode → SCREEN_ATTRACT.

functions.name: select_char_input
functions.summary: Character select grid input: 8 fighter buttons mapped via sCharButtonTbl and sRemapSlotTbl to gRemapTable. D-pad cycles between 9 slots (0-8).

functions.name: select_char_update
functions.summary: Character select display update: animates frameCounter, applies remap when selection changes, handles highlight transition back to previous selection.

functions.name: select_char_task
functions.summary: Character select main task: polls controller analogue buttons → select_char_input + select_char_update.

functions.name: select_stage_task
functions.summary: Stage select / options entry: waits for either player at slot 8 (options), press start → SCREEN_TITLE.

functions.name: select_stage_screen
functions.summary: Stage selection screen: L/R cycles through x_edb381f3 stages, loads background preview via wad, Start → game (SCREEN_TITLE).

functions.name: select_score_confirm
functions.summary: Score display: press Start by either player → transition to game (SCREEN_TITLE).

functions.name: select_digit_render
functions.summary: Render a 3-digit number (0-999) using digit sprite objects from 'options2.sp2'. Handles leading zero suppression.

functions.name: select_score_display
functions.summary: Display sorted scores one row per tick: character portrait + score + win/loss stats. 10-tick delay between rows.

functions.name: select_score_init
functions.summary: Init score display: creates 10 digit sprite objects, builds character sort order by weighted win/loss average.

globals.name: sCharButtonTbl
globals.summary: Character ID → button mask mapping (8 entries, also used in menu.c)

globals.name: sDigitObjs
globals.summary: 10 digit sprite objects for score display

globals.name: sCharSortOrder
globals.summary: Character index sort order by weighted score (descending)

globals.name: sScorePos
globals.summary: XY position tracker for score row rendering

subsystems: Options menu: 10-slot grid with d-pad navigation, 15-frame debounce, per-slot value animation
Character select: 8-button grid with remap table, animated frame cycling
Stage select: preview load per wad + start-to-play
Score display: sorted character ranking with digit rendering
open_questions: What are the exact screen IDs (SCREEN_TITLE, x_b84bd571, etc.)?
The macro x_7fe97e23 should be renamed to something meaningful (e.g., DIGIT_COUNT)
